title: UV Reflective Epoxy Flooring - Elite South Texas
content:
UV Reflective
Light reflective coatings are engineered to increase reflectivity of artificial lighting to improve visibility and light spread, while lowering energy costs. Rather than letting light be lost through absorption, these coatings reflect the light energy back into the space.
Warehouses
Manufacturing Areas
Food Processing Plants
Offices & Retail Spaces
Greenhouses & Indoor Agriculture
Cannabis Grow Facilities
Contact an Elite South Texas technical representative for more details.
